title: Implement semantAH docs markdown ingest MVP

execution.summary: Build the first real semantAH ingest path for Markdown docs only, with deterministic chunks and validated store rows.

acceptance.assertion: Markdown ingest produces deterministic chunk IDs with source_ref and content/text hashes.
The MVP performs no graph generation, no Related writes, and no autonomous note mutation.
A fixture-backed search smoke proves that ingested docs can be searched.
